changes: Added rand4() utility — 4-char random alphanumeric suffix for sysmsg IDs
Added DEFAULT_SYSMSG_RULES constant with all default persistence flags
Added SYSMSG_ICONS map — emoji icons per system message type
Added buildCompactGroup(type) — maps types to compact-group keys
Added buildSysMsgText(type, actor, target, payload) — human-readable text
Added shouldPersistSysMsg(type, rules) — checks room sysMsg rules before persisting
Added createSysMsg(room, type, ...) — fully implemented: checks rules, writes rooms-meta/{room}/sysmsg/{id}.json, shows toast if showToastAlso
Added fetchNewSysMsgs(room, sinceTs) — lists sysmsg dir (cached 30s), fetches new files in parallel batches of 5
Added buildSysMsgRow(obj, rules) — builds .sys-msg-row DOM element with icon, text, timestamp; respects visibility rules
Added insertIntoTimeline(row, createdAt) — inserts row at correct chronological position in #messages
Added _SYSMSG_CSS injected via _applyOnceCSS on first buildSysMsgRow call
Hooked fetchAndRenderNewSysMsgs into syncLatestFromStorage final exit path
